rationale: Documentation and FAQ for UUID behavior; no driver behavioral deviation from spec.
Gevent timeout causing deadlock; internal concurrency bug, no specific contradicted spec rule.
SDAM spec requires marking server Unknown on NotMaster in writeConcernError; prose test was never implemented.
Update AWS keys in FLE tests per DRIVERS-1365; test infrastructure update, not driver behavior fix.
Update SDAM monitoring tests with directConnection URI option; spec test resync from DRIVERS-1249.
Improvement type with Depends:DRIVERS-848; proactive spec rollout to add $uuid parsing, driver not previously wrong.
API ergonomics improvement adding JSONOptions.with_options; no spec rule violated, convenience method only.
Auth spec explicitly requires PUT for IMDSv2 token request; driver used POST, causing auth failures on IMDSv2.
Improvement, Depends:DRIVERS-1323; proactive spec rollout to use server error codes, driver not previously wrong.
Specify error label in retryable writes YAML test per DRIVERS-1356; test infrastructure update.
Ensure retryable writes spec tests check errorLabels presence/absence per DRIVERS-1354; test update.
Memory leak with custom TypeCodec in find cursor; internal GC/object retention bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1042, Improvement type; proactive CMAP spec rollout, driver not previously wrong.
Sessions spec says driver MUST mark ServerSession dirty after network error; pymongo failed existing spec test.
Add runtime version check for libmongocrypt binary; internal dependency management, no spec rule.
BulkWriteError cannot be pickled; Python-specific serialization limitation, no spec rule about exception pickling.
Type annotation for bson.decode returns Mapping causing mypy error; type hint issue, no spec rule about return types.
ServerDescription and AutoReconnect objects grow unboundedly from malformed URI; memory leak, no spec rule violated.
String representation of BulkWriteError regressed; error message formatting, no spec rule about exception string format.
namedtuple._asdict() differs in Python 3.4.2; Python version compatibility bug, no spec rule involved.
TypeError in pyOpenSSL with socket timeout None; Python/pyOpenSSL compatibility bug, no contradicted spec rule.
Spec requires honoring server-supplied RetryableWriteError errorLabels field; driver ignored it, writes not retried.
Packaging/installation of cryptography dependency; build/packaging work, no spec rule involved.
Make MongoClient/Database/Collection hashable for use in caches; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Testing Data Lake integration per DRIVERS-829; test infrastructure for new platform scenario.
Test 3.6 drivers against 4.4 servers per DRIVERS-1352; CI matrix expansion, no spec conformance issue.
Improvement type, Depends:DRIVERS-996; proactive new Stable API spec feature, driver not previously wrong.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1505; update spec tests where $listLocalSessions unsupported in API version 1.
Clarify PyOpenSSL CA cert loading on Windows/macOS; internal SSL config detail, no spec rule.
mongo-orchestration CI failure due to server renaming slaveDelay; CI tooling bug, no driver spec violation.
Improvement type, Depends:DRIVERS-1459, empty description; proactive CSFLE spec rollout, driver not previously wrong.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1376, Improvement type; define Mongos error handling per spec update, proactive rollout.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1506, Improvement type; new change stream delta oplog parsing feature, not prior nonconformance.
Connection errors should include host in message; error message quality improvement, no spec rule mandates this.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1152, Improvement type; stop inspecting error message strings for not-master, proactive spec rollout.
Add RawBSONDocument usage example to documentation; docs improvement, no spec or driver behavior involved.
Fix doc typo referencing nonexistent encryption algorithm; documentation error only.
Auth failure regression in PSA topology with minPoolSize; implementation regression, no specific spec rule cited.
AttributeError instead of InvalidURI when mixing ssl=True and tls=False; internal code path bug, no specific spec rule about keyword arg conflict handling.
Error message quality when mongocryptd spawn fails; UX improvement, no spec rule mandates error content.
Raise warning for no_cursor_timeout with implicit session; advisory UX improvement, no spec rule requires this warning.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1595; add Versioned API test for abortTransaction, test infrastructure update.
Depends on DRIVERS-1594; fix Versioned API test server version constraint, test infrastructure fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1649, Improvement type; rename acceptAPIVersion2 field to match spec, proactive spec rollout.
Remove several platform build configurations; CI/build infrastructure change, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1387, Improvement type; update serverSelectionTimeoutMS for mongocryptd, proactive spec rollout.
Depends on DRIVERS-1538; add UTF test ensuring success when neither expectError nor expectResult specified, test runner update.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1638; add spec test verifying session unpinned after non-transaction operation.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1437, Improvement type; change estimatedDocumentCount to $collStats, proactive spec rollout.
Deprecate ssl_keyfile/ssl_certfile in favor of tls* equivalents; deprecation notice, no prior wrong behavior.
